title: Apple AI Glasses Will Rival Meta’s With Several Styles, Oval Cameras
description: Also: The latest on the foldable iPhone.

title: Leonard Green Nears $3 Billion Deal for Cumming Group, FT Says
description: Private equity firm Leonard Green and Partners is closing in on an acquisition of Cumming Group, a construction project consultancy firm owned by fellow buyout firm New Mountain Capital, the Financial Times reported.

title: China Unveils Taiwan Goodwill Steps After Opposition Talks
description: China announced a series of policy measures to demonstrate “goodwill” toward Taiwan on Sunday, following a landmark meeting between President Xi Jinping and Taiwan opposition leader Cheng Li-wun.
